prompt: Create a new 'CheckoutButton' component for the shopping list screen. It should say 'Items kaufen' and have a cart icon from Expo vector icons.

assertions.name: uses_theme_color
assertions.description: Component uses THEME_COLOR instead of hardcoded hex colors.

assertions.name: no_tailwind
assertions.description: Component does not use className or Tailwind classes.

prompt: We need a horizontal FlatList component called 'CategoryScroller' that lists food categories like 'Vegan', 'Meat', 'Dessert'. It needs to be highly performant because it will be placed above the main video feed.

assertions.name: uses_usecallback
assertions.description: Component uses useCallback for the renderItem function.

assertions.name: flatlist_optimization
assertions.description: FlatList uses initialNumToRender or windowSize for performance.

prompt: Build a simple user profile header component. It takes a 'user' object prop with an 'avatar_url' and 'username', and displays them next to a 'Follow' button.

assertions.name: uses_theme_color
assertions.description: Component uses THEME_COLOR for the Follow button.

assertions.name: uses_stylesheet
assertions.description: Component uses StyleSheet.create instead of inline styles for layout.
